creator: cs@innolan.dk
text:
Created attachment 174628
ntpa-0.7.3.diff

Portlint:
  Looks fine.

Poudriere:
  No errors.

Change Log:
  - Drift file tracking
  - Introduced SQL logging
  - Extended debug logging
  - Schema version checker
  - Fixed bug in packet counters
  - Fixed time zone bug in host page
  - Fixed thread bug in scheduler
  - Fixed bug in user/group settings
  - UTF-8 support in TCP command module
  - Prepare upgrade of nplot to 0.9.11


The update include changes to prepare for a transition from an embedded version of NPlot to a new based on pkg-config.
